cases.name: AI Image Brief
cases.purpose: Reference a safe brief for generated cover, background, or concept visuals.
cases.style: art-directed visual material with explicit no-text, no-number, and safe-overlay constraints
disabled_when: exact text is required inside the generated image
financial figures or tables must be represented
source notes or formal conclusions are needed
cases.notes: Use image generation for visual material only. Exact text, charts, figures, and source notes are layered later.
